ItacPersonItem.Notes: Abriani joined the Ricovrati in 1689. He was Secretary of the Academy in 1691-1692. In a public gathering of the Academy in 1690, he discussed the following problem: `Se a beneficio de` sudditi piu` giovi la bonta` delle leggi, o del Rettore`. In 1692, he delivered the following public speech: `La moda, overo il costume d`oggidi``
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
